{{Infobox character
| name = Benji
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = false Gardener, pseudo-Gardener, newly minted Gardener, Reader
| abilities = Awakening process
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Benji Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Benji, formerly known as Jeralt Herris, is a Vandenyan man characterized by his caramel skin and a missing ear. He was born to a musician and a banker in the [[Capital]], but he abandoned his original identity following a period of childhood captivity. Approximately fifteen years prior to recent events, he was one of many children abducted from a park by the revolutionary [[Rudeus Maxwell]]. During this time, he was trained as an assassin alongside other children. Following their training, these individuals were either returned to their families or placed with the [[Luminian Order]] as orphans. In his adult [[life]], Benji has been involved in political upheaval, claiming credit with his fellow trained killers for the assassination of a [[Regent]]. He has also operated under the guise of a [[Gardener]]. In more recent developments, he has become associated with the [[Guild]], where he is still learning the established protocols. During these activities, he has demonstrated the ability to hover in midair while surrounded by a cloud of purple-light butterflies, utilizing shears that transform into hooked, sickle-like implements.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Benji]] is an assassin trained by [[Maxwell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Benji]] is a man who was once a boy and is currently in a cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As one of [[Shera]]'s false [[Gardeners]], Benji is a pseudo-[[Gardener]] who underwent training under [[Maxwell]]. He carries a pair of shears that are required to belong to [[Lucan]]. Having completed the [[Awakening]] process as a [[Reader]], Benji is a newly minted [[Gardener]] with the ambition to become [[Soulbound]]. During his experiences, he floats within a cloud of purple-light butterflies and possesses the strength to lift [[Shera]] over.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] is one of [[Shera]]'s false [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] is a pseudo-[[Gardener]] trained by [[Maxwell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] carries a pair of shears that must be [[Lucan]]'s.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] is a newly minted [[Gardener]] who wants to become [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] is a [[Reader]] who completed the [[Awakening]] process.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] floats in a cloud of purple-light butterflies.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Benji]] can lift [[Shera]] over.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
